positive: A central, stylized illustration of a majestic crescent moon surrounded by a whimsical forest of oversized, bioluminescent ferns and glowing sapling trees. The style is neo-art nouveau mixed with modern tattoo flash, featuring thick, confident linework and intricate blackwork. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, moss green, and glowing pale teal accents, contrasted against a rich, creamy off-white background. Composition must be highly detailed and symmetrical, designed for seamless printing on apparel. Focus on clean, graphic shapes, strong negative space definition, and clean silhouettes. Full body view, perfect for textile print.
